steps.title: Identify the sampled group
steps.content: The sample was selected at random from fifth-grade students at one school. That means the survey can represent the population from which the sample was drawn.

steps.title: Limit the conclusion
steps.content: The survey did not sample other grade levels or fifth-grade students at other schools. It also should not be limited only to the $45$ surveyed students, because the sample was random.

steps.title: Choose the largest valid population
steps.content: The largest population supported by the sampling method is all fifth-grade students at that school. The answer is B.
